free_text: Formation of light nuclei in reactions with B-11 and
Ne-20 ions at energies of 18-20 MeV per nucleon
Two dE-E telescopes were used. Each
telescope consisted of a silicon dE detector with the
thickness of sensitive layer 60 mu-m and E detector
with a sensitive layer of 2 mm.
Detector was placed at the angle of 10 degrees
changed, STATUS in Sub 044-047 were added.
Author's names corrected according to BAS,52,(11),90.
Ta-181 targets of 2.5 mg/cm2 thickness were used.
SD: ERR-ANALYS and STATUS were updated.
Values in DATA and COMMON sections updated.
